2603.17372.title: Understanding and Defending VLM Jailbreaks via Jailbreak-Related Representation Shift
2603.17372.paper_summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) often exhibit weakened safety alignment with the integration of the visual modality. Even when text prompts contain explicit harmful intent, adding an image can substantially increase jailbreak success rates. In this paper, we observe that VLMs can clearly distinguish benign inputs from harmful ones in their representation space. Moreover, even among harmful inputs, jailbreak samples form a distinct internal state that is separable from refusal samples. These observations suggest that jailbreaks do not arise from a failure to recognize harmful intent. Instead, the visual modality shifts representations toward a specific jailbreak state, thereby leading to a failure to trigger refusal. To quantify this transition, we identify a jailbreak direction and define the jailbreak-related shift as the component of the image-induced representation shift along this direction. Our analysis shows that the jailbreak-related shift reliably characterizes jailbreak behavior, providing a unified explanation for diverse jailbreak scenarios. Finally, we propose a defense method that enhances VLM safety by removing the jailbreak-related shift (JRS-Rem) at inference time. Experiments show that JRS-Rem provides strong defense across multiple scenarios while preserving performance on benign tasks.
2603.17372.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺語言模型（VLMs）在整合視覺模態時，往往表現出減弱的安全對齊。即使文本提示包含明確的有害意圖，添加圖像也能顯著提高越獄成功率。在本文中，我們觀察到 VLMs 能夠清楚地區分其表示空間中的良性輸入和有害輸入。此外，即使在有害輸入中，越獄樣本形成一種與拒絕樣本可分離的獨特內部狀態。這些觀察表明，越獄並不是因為未能識別有害意圖而產生的。相反，視覺模態將表示轉向特定的越獄狀態，從而導致未能觸發拒絕。為了量化這一過渡，我們確定了一個越獄方向，並將與越獄相關的轉變定義為沿著這一方向的圖像引起的表示轉變的組成部分。我們的分析顯示，與越獄相關的轉變可靠地表徵了越獄行為，為多樣的越獄場景提供了統一的解釋。最後，我們提出了一種防禦方法，在推理時通過去除與越獄相關的轉變（JRS-Rem）來增強 VLM 的安全性。實驗表明，JRS-Rem 在多個場景中提供了強有力的防禦，同時保持了對良性任務的性能。
2603.17372.author: Zhihua Wei et.al.
2603.17372.authors: Zhihua Wei, Qiang Li, Jian Ruan, Zhenxin Qin, Leilei Wen, Dongrui Liu, Wen Shen
